working_on: ROADMAP.md substantive cleanup — Phase 1.5.5 close. Strip in-document revision narration (date-stamped per-phase markers, supersession prose, per-assertion ADR parentheticals) and consolidate cross-references end-of-section per ADR 0036 / docs/operations/document-voice.md three-speech-acts handling. Phase scope, success criteria, and cross-phase commitment list survive at present-state voice; CHANGELOG and git carry the trace.
outcome_summary: ROADMAP.md reauthored under ADR 0036's three-speech-acts handling. Cleaned six concentrated areas: §1.2 (revision marker + per-bullet ADR cites consolidated to See also; OQ-BYOK-REGIME line dropped); Phase 1.5 (header marker + meta-procedural paragraph dropped; subsection 1.5.1-1.5.4 session attributions dropped; substance rewritten to present-state form; new 1.5.5 inward-document contract subsection authored; success criteria rewritten; plan-reference subsection dropped); Phase 4.5 (Added marker + axis-2 supersession narration cleaned); Phase 8 (header marker + supersession-narration paragraph dropped; per-bullet ADR cites consolidated to See also; OQ-BYOK retraction note dropped); Phase 9 (phase + success-criteria block markers dropped; 11-bullet per-assertion ADR cites consolidated to See also; supersession remnants 'reframed at S-0012' / 'preserved unchanged through ADR 0035' / 'inherited from ADR 0032' removed throughout); Strong working commitments (preamble shortened; commitment 2 supersession parenthetical reduced; bare-text ADR cites converted to live links; one filename typo caught and fixed). Spot-check pass surfaced and fixed three small staleness/style issues (Phase 0 (in progress) suffix stripped; 'ADR 0033 lands' -> 'ADR 0033 contracts'; 'ROADMAP.md is reauthored against the contract' -> 'carries the contract's voice'). MemPalace decision drawer drawer_paideia_general_60eb2be239b7a77e36b43a47 filed (wing=paideia, room=general) capturing the substantive cleanup narrative including why kindred-tools-separately-scoped framing matters for amendment discipline. tools/validate.py clean (0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns). STATE.md reflows: Current phase row consolidated; Last build session row carries S-0021 with full specifics; Prior build session shifted to S-0020 (S-0019 row drops out); Open tensions section header date updated to S-0021 close (count unchanged at 9); Strong working commitments narrative paragraph at the bottom shortened from session-by-session ADR-count accumulation to the present-state count + four-layer-trace pointer. Next session work item rewritten for S-0022 (Phase 2 Build Plan Scaffolding open). Phase 1.5.5 + Phase 1.5 close at S-0021 close.
